name: Surprise Fusion
name_jp: サプライズ・フュージョン
desc: Target 1 face-up monster you control and declare 1 Monster Type and 1 Attribute; that monster becomes that Type and Attribute, then you can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control, including the targeted monster. You can banish this card from your GY; Tribute 1 Fusion Monster, and if you do, Special Summon 2 "Surprise Tokens" (Spellcaster/DARK/ATK 0/DEF 0) with a Level equal to the Level the Tributed monster had on the field. You can only use this effect of "Surprise Fusion" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster you control and declare 1 Monster Type and 1 Attribute; that monster becomes that Type and Attribute, then you can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control, including the targeted monster. You can banish this card from your GY; Tribute 1 Fusion Monster, and if you do, Special Summon 2 "Surprise Tokens" (Spellcaster/DARK/ATK 0/DEF 0) with a Level equal to the Level the Tributed monster had on the field. You can only use this effect of "Surprise Fusion" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
